findings.detail: 7-node TD flowchart cleanly maps the three-path output validator pattern from corpus §5.7 and §6. Decision diamonds B and E correctly branch pass/fail. All node labels (2-3 words each) trace directly to corpus phrases. Color tiers correct: start (blue) for entry, auto (purple) for validation steps and retry, done (green) for all three terminal outcomes. Title 'Output Validator Pattern' properly placed in config block, not as a ghost node. No label exceeds 4 words. No bare unexplained acronyms. Branching is appropriate for the three-path intent (not linear-flow-branched violation).
